transcript: Got a man hole. Sam did roll but wasn't expecting the ball. Hidalgo now, 4v1 in transition. Kicks to the right for two. Just running in numbers every single time. Bye bye bye, au revoir. Five for the offensive boards, Canada win it, French 24. Another 50-50 ball that they win. Wow, give it, shoot it in early, was questionable, but she makes it and nobody will question that. Delaney Gibb from way downtown. Where's the next pass? They've found it. Buenavida, where's the next one? There's Flores, off the dribble. Has to let it go. On the buzzer. This place is erupting. She was behind the backboard. What a move from Olivia Flores. She drives. Draws the contact on the blocking foul. But man, let's see what coach has drawn up here, rejects the screen, grace down, but man! What a finish! But man, let's see what coach has drawn up here, rejects the screen. Brace down, but man, what a finish, through all the contact. Timeout called again, that was superb, Coach Joni Taylor knows what she's doing.
